title: tecoma africana
intro: Tecoma africana, also known as the Yellow Bells or Cape Honeysuckle, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been found to exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tecoma africana include its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Tecoma africana often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
